projectDescription: A GCP fork of Prometheus that exports metrics to Google Cloud Managed Service for Prometheus (GMP) via an in-memory GCM export pipeline.
keyFeatures: In-process export of Prometheus metrics to Google Cloud Monitoring (GCM) gRPC API
Remote Write 2.x to GCM proxy (prw2gcm) for sidecar deployments
Hot-reloadable GMP export and query configuration
Kubernetes-native secret provider for secure scrape credentials
HA master-election via configurable lease backends (none or Kubernetes)
Full upstream Prometheus compatibility: scraping, PromQL, alerting, TSDB
Metric type prefix and monitored resource label mapping for GCM
Docker-based multi-stage build with BoringCrypto FIPS support
publicApiSurface: export.ExporterOpts — configuration options for the exporter
export.NopExporter() — returns a permanently disabled exporter
export.Exporter.Export(ctx, records) — exports WAL records to GCM
setup.ExporterOptsFlags(app, opts) — registers CLI flags for exporter
google/config.GoogleCloudConfig — YAML config struct for GMP options
google/lease.Lease interface — Range() / Run() for HA election
prw2gcm — Remote Write 2.x to GCM proxy binary
